title: Service Technician - Outdoor
description:
Job Highlights

  • Company vehicle (Car) provided for work. (Fuel, Cash card covered by Company)
  • Flexible working culture
  • Able to learn all types of home appliances maintenance

Job Description

Responsibilities

  • To perform accurate diagnoses, repair services , preventive maintenance at customer locations island wide (homes/ offices) in accordance with Company's established procedures, techniques, tools, test equipment and replacement parts.
  • Able to communicate diagnosis and needed repairs of products to the customer in a knowledgeable and courteous manner
  • Providing service reports and accurate estimates for quotation of repair
  • Assist in new projects or any other duties as and when assigned by superior.
  • To attend in-house technical training to improve skill set provided by the company.

Job Requirements

  • Diploma / Higher Nitec / Nitec preferred (Engineering background)
  • New graduates who are interested may also apply.
  • Must be a fast learner, keen to learn and able to apply knowledge.
  • **Knowledge of operating / repair home appliances / basic electrical (training provided)
  • Must possess valid Class 3 Driving License ( more than 2 yrs )
  • **Must be physically fit and strong (required to move/carry appliances occassionally)
  • Immediate hire

Additional Benefits:

  • Company vehicle can be driven home
  • Those who owned vehicle can claim transport allowance

A good career growth awaits the successful candidate.

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


****Only apply if you are really keen to pick up the skills.

postedCompany.description:
TNG Alliance Pte Ltd is founded in 2019 by 2 engineers, Tan & Goh, with extensive knowledge of home appliances and a mission to be a leading provider of home appliances. Today, TNG Alliance grows to a team of 17 dedicated staff to offer comprehensive, professional and affordable aftersales services and appliances.

In 2020, co-founder Goh Ching Leng is awarded “Singapore Entrepreneur 100 award 2020” by Association of Trade and Commerce (Singapore). Looking ahead, the company will continue to deliver quality home appliances and service to Singapore and overseas with its partners.


TNG Alliance is the authorized service centre for Whirlpool, Ariston, KitchenAid, Sharp and Fujioh home appliances in Singapore. We offer onsite and walk-in repairs as well as delivery service for businesses and consumers.


In our goal to provide state-of-the-art products at affordable price, TNG Alliance has launched its own line of home appliances under “TNG” certified with Singapore Safety Mark. The first product launch in 2020 is the Chest Freezer Matte Black Series followed by the Bar fridge. More TNG product launches will follow in the next few years
postedCompany.name: TNG ALLIANCE PTE. LTD.
